title: The First Quarter Of 2024 Has Been Quite Fruitful
section_path: The First Quarter Of 2024 Has Been Quite Fruitful
section_path_text: The First Quarter Of 2024 Has Been Quite Fruitful
summary:
Main
By Michalis Voutsinas
The downward correction that began a couple of weeks ago persisted throughout the thirteenth trading week, further driving the Baltic Dry Index down to 1821 points. Reflecting the severity of this correction, Thursday's closing was approximately 600 points lower than the recent March highs. Despite the recent sell-off, the gauge of activity in the dry bulk spectrum remained 23 percent higher than its value a year ago.
